content: Hi, I'm Sutton. I'm a DevOps engineer, and I've been thinking about learning some new skills to help me in my career. I recently adopted a parrot named Milo from a shelter, and he's been keeping me on my toes.
Hi Sutton, nice to meet you! That's great that you're thinking of expanding your skills. Congratulations on adopting Milo, that's so exciting! What kind of skills are you interested in learning?

Thanks! I've been thinking about learning more about home automation. I've always been interested in it, but I've never had the time to dive in. Now that I have Milo, I think it would be a great way to make my home more comfortable and convenient for both of us.
That's a great idea, Sutton! Home automation can be a really fun and rewarding hobby. Have you thought about using a platform like SmartThings or Home Assistant to control your devices?
Yeah, I've been looking at a few different options. I think I'll probably go with Home Assistant, since it's open-source and highly customizable.

That's a great choice, Sutton! Home Assistant is a really powerful platform. Do you have any experience with rust programming or other systems programming languages? I've found that they can be really helpful for automating complex tasks and integrating different systems.
Actually, I've been learning rust for a few months now. I love the language and the community, and I think it could be really useful for my home automation projects.

That's great, Sutton! Rust is a really interesting language, and it's gaining popularity in the systems programming community. Have you thought about contributing to any open-source projects or attending any rust meetups?
Yeah, I've been thinking about it. I'd love to get more involved in the community and learn from other developers. Maybe I'll even start a blog to share my experiences and knowledge with others.

That's a great idea, Sutton! Starting a blog can be a really fun and rewarding way to share your passion with others. And contributing to open-source projects can be a great way to give back to the community and learn from others.
I've also been thinking about getting into skiing. I love the mountains and I think it could be a great way to challenge myself and try something new.
That's a great idea, Sutton! Skiing can be a really fun and rewarding experience. Have you thought about taking a lesson or renting equipment to get started?
Yeah, I've been looking at a few different options. I think I'll probably go with a group lesson, so I can learn the basics and get some feedback.
That's a great plan, Sutton! Learning from an experienced instructor can be really helpful. And who knows, maybe you'll discover a new passion for skiing!
Thanks for the chat, it's been really helpful. I'm looking forward to learning more about home automation and skiing.
You're welcome, Sutton! It was great chatting with you. I'll talk to you soon, maybe we can discuss more about your home automation projects and skiing adventures.
